mapper.insert: insert into appuser (APP_USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD , MBTI_TYPE_ID, CREATED_AT, UFILE, MOBILE, NICKNAME, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_ID ) VALUES ( appuser_seq.nextval, #{appUserId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{mbtiTypeId}, #{createdAt}, #{ufile}, #{mobile}, #{nickname}, #{provider}, #{providerId} )
mapper.select: select count(*) from appuser where email = #{email}
mapper.update: update appuser set password = #{password}, mbti_type_id = #{mbtiTypeId}, ufile = #{ufile}, nickname = #{nickname}, mobile = #{mobile}, provider = #{provider}, provider_id = #{providerId}, where app_user_id = #{appUserId}
mapper.insert: insert into authorities (auth_id, email, auth) VALUES ( authorities_seq.nextval, #{email} , #{auth} )
